matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-access-001 title: user logs in successfully for the first time module: access source pages: 1 preconditions: user has never accessed the app before. test data: valid username and password. test steps: 1. user opens the app. 2. user is prompted to enter credentials. 3. user enters valid username and password. 4. application sends credentials to the server. 5. server verifies credentials against the database. 6. server confirms valid credentials. 7. application compares entered credentials with those in the database. 8. application informs the user that the login was successful. expected result: user is redirected to the home page.

matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-trip-001 title: user starts a trip and completes it module: trip source pages: 2,3 preconditions: user is logged in and on the home page. test data: valid trip details. test steps: 1. user is on the home page. 2. user selects to start a trip. 3. application sends trip details to the server. 4. server processes the trip details and stores them in the database. 5. server confirms the trip has started. 6. user completes the trip. 7. application sends a completion signal to the server. 8. server updates the trip status to completed. 9. application informs the user that the trip is completed. 10. application prompts the user to calculate emissions. expected result: user is redirected to the tragitto terminato state.

matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-trip-003 title: user calculates emissions after completing a trip module: trip source pages: 2,3 preconditions: user has completed a trip. test data: valid emission calculation details. test steps: 1. user is on the tragitto terminato state. 2. application prompts the user to calculate emissions. 3. user provides valid emission calculation details. 4. application sends emission details to the server. 5. server processes the emission details. 6. server returns the calculated emissions to the application. 7. application displays the calculated emissions to the user. expected result: user sees the calculated emissions on the tragitto terminato state.

matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-sequence-003 title: user starts a trip and calculates emissions module: emission calculation source pages: 6 preconditions: user is logged in and on the home page. test data: valid trip details and emission calculation details. test steps: 1. user is on the home page. 2. user selects to start a trip. 3. application sends trip details to the server. 4. server processes the trip details and stores them in the database. 5. server confirms the trip has started. 6. user completes the trip. 7. application sends a completion signal to the server. 8. server updates the trip status to completed. 9. application prompts the user to calculate emissions. 10. user provides valid emission calculation details. 11. application sends emission details to the server. 12. server processes the emission details. 13. server returns the calculated emissions to the application. 14. application displays the calculated emissions to the user. expected result: user sees the calculated emissions on the tragitto terminato state.

matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-sequence-007 title: user starts a trip and calculates emissions with no data module: emission calculation source pages: 6 preconditions: user is logged in and on the home page. test data: no emission calculation details. test steps: 1. user is on the home page. 2. user selects to start a trip. 3. application sends trip details to the server. 4. server processes the trip details and stores them in the database. 5. server confirms the trip has started. 6. user completes the trip. 7. application prompts the user to calculate emissions. 8. user provides no emission calculation details. 9. application sends no emission details to the server. 10. server processes the absence of emission details. 11. server returns a warning message to the application. 12. application informs the user that the emission calculation was not performed. expected result: user sees a warning message on the tragitto terminato state.

matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-trip-001 title: user starts a trip and completes it module: trip source pages: 2,3 preconditions: user is logged in and on the home page. test data: valid trip details. test steps: 1. user is on the home page. 2. user selects to start a trip. 3. application sends trip details to the server. 4. server processes the trip details and stores them in the database. 5. server confirms the trip has started. 6. user completes the trip. 7. application sends a completion signal to the server. 8. server updates the trip status to completed. 9. application informs the user that the trip is completed. 10. application prompts the user to calculate emissions. expected result: user is redirected to the tragitto terminato state.

test case id: tc-trip-001 title: user starts a trip and completes it module: trip source pages: 2,3 preconditions: user is logged in and on the home page. test data: valid trip details. test steps: 1. user is on the home page. 2. user selects to start a trip. 3. application sends trip details to the server. 4. server processes the trip details and stores them in the database. 5. server confirms the trip has started. 6. user completes the trip. 7. application sends a completion signal to the server. 8. server updates the trip status to completed. 9. application informs the user that the trip is completed. 10. application prompts the user to calculate emissions. expected result: user is redirected to the tragitto terminato state.
